# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. Entries are generated by homeboy from git commits.

## [0.6.0] - 2026-07-16

### Added
- add workflow run await service
- emit audit action hook on capability-denied tool calls (#412 Stage D)
- add wp_agent_can_access_agent host access filter for list/check symmetry
- add per-agent runtime model-binding primitive (#415)
- safe-by-default tool curation — write-capable tools opt-in for autonomous principals
- derive a write-excluding safe default ceiling for autonomous executions
- enforce capability ceiling at ability-backed tool execution (#412 B+C)
- promote a generic scoped Action Scheduler drain into the workflow substrate
- add first-class artifacts/logs fields to workflow run results

### Changed
- per-agent routing for register_chat_handler()
- Remove Data Machine-specific product blacklist entries
- Run Docs Agent
- Run Docs Agent through the native executor
- Expose redacted tool observability metadata
- Expose compact tool observability in chat metadata
- Overlay trusted runtime tool declarations
- Handle HybridStore missing group claims in scoped drain
- Add workflow scoped drain await helper

### Fixed
- Fix Composer bootstrap compatibility before v0.6.0
- Fix native Docs Agent producer contract
- Fix async runner dispatch result honesty

## [0.5.1] - 2026-07-03

### Changed
- Concurrent parallel branch fan-out + terminal-completion hook
- Make the parallel-roles aggregator optional and generically named
- Add Action Scheduler branch executor for async parallel branches (Phase 2)
- Add suspendable workflow run model + branch-executor seam (Phase 1)

### Fixed
- derive async-runner loopback scheme+port from the internal server, not the public URL
- keep AS concurrency ceiling open for the terminal resume so a fan-out drains itself
- gate branch concurrency on in-flight (pending + in-progress), not pending alone
- drop orphaned test-CI version_target from homeboy.json
- Fix parallel smoke test: stub do_action for the run-completed hook
- Fix async branch fanout: offload payload out of AS args + fail loud on enqueue failure
- Fix silent hang: serialize branch reconcile so concurrent completions never lose the resume

## [0.5.0] - 2026-06-30

### Added
- add dispatch-provider seam to default provider-turn adapter
- ship default provider-turn adapter and run_conversation facade

### Changed
- Add a generic `parallel` workflow step handler (agent fanout)
- Retry transient provider failures (429 + 5xx) with bounded backoff in the default turn adapter
- Serialize empty function-declaration parameters as a JSON object, not []
- Wire enabled_tools so native bundle agents actually invoke tools (+ require_tool_use completion gate)
- Raise agentic per-request provider timeout from wp-ai-client's 30s default
- Resolve model id string to ModelInterface in default turn adapter
- Add deterministic tool-call gating to the conversation loop
- Ship a default provider-agnostic agents/chat runtime handler
- Preserve a tool result's machine-readable error_type through normalization
- Dispatch tool calls to a registered executor by target_id
- Carry the full pending-action shape in the canonical approval envelope
- scrub channel vendor names from generic Channels layer
- Keep chat run bridge docs provider agnostic
- Document external chat run bridges
- Harden run read envelopes
- Neutralize product boundary test vocabulary
- Add JSON-RPC task method compatibility

### Fixed
- Fix runtime package helper late registration
- Fix runtime package ability PHPStan typing
- Fix runtime package ability late registration
